summary: Supplier Credentials Management - Complete testing of per-agency supplier API credential management system. All 25 backend tests PASS (100%). Frontend AdminSupplierCredentialsPage renders correctly with tabs (Acenteler, Audit Log), agency detail view with 4 supplier cards, masked credentials, and all action buttons working.

issues: Supplier Credentials link is in adminNav.js under 'SİSTEM YÖNETİMİ' section but may require scrolling to see in the sidebar. Route works when accessed directly at /app/admin/supplier-credentials

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/supplier-credentials/supported - Returns all 4 suppliers (ratehawk, tbo, paximum, wwtatil) with required_fields
POST /api/supplier-credentials/save - Saves credentials with AES-256 encryption, validates required fields, returns masked response
GET /api/supplier-credentials/my - Returns own agency credentials with masked sensitive values (****...)
POST /api/supplier-credentials/test/{supplier} - Tests connection via supplier auth endpoints, updates last_test_result
DELETE /api/supplier-credentials/{supplier} - Deletes credentials and cached tokens
PUT /api/supplier-credentials/toggle/{supplier} - Enable/Disable with proper validation (rejects enable without PASS test)
GET /api/supplier-credentials/admin/agencies - Super admin lists all agencies with credential summary
GET /api/supplier-credentials/admin/agency/{org_id} - Get specific agency credentials (admin only)
POST /api/supplier-credentials/admin/agency/{org_id}/save - Save credentials for specific agency (admin only)
DELETE /api/supplier-credentials/admin/agency/{org_id}/{supplier} - Delete for specific agency (admin only)
PUT /api/supplier-credentials/admin/agency/{org_id}/toggle/{supplier} - Toggle for specific agency (admin only)
GET /api/supplier-credentials/admin/audit-log - View audit log with optional org filter
RBAC properly enforced: agency_admin gets 403 on all /admin/* endpoints but can access /my, /save, /test, /toggle

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI elements render correctly, buttons clickable)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests create TEST_ prefixed credentials for testing purposes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supplier Credentials Management fully tested. Key features: 1) AdminSupplierCredentialsPage at /app/admin/supplier-credentials with 2 tabs: Acenteler (agencies list) and Audit Log, 2) Agency detail view shows 4 supplier cards (RateHawk, TBO Holidays, Paximum, WWTatil) with masked credentials and action buttons (Test, Edit, Enable/Disable, Remove), 3) Credentials are AES-256 encrypted (using Fernet), sensitive fields show as ****..., 4) Test connection hits real supplier APIs but with fake credentials returns FAIL (expected), 5) Toggle Enable is blocked unless last_test_result=PASS, 6) Audit logging records all actions (save, test, enable, disable, delete), 7) RBAC: agency_admin blocked from /admin/* endpoints (403), can only manage own credentials via /my, /save, /test, /toggle, /delete, 8) Existing data for org 913ccb33-2717-448a-bceb-39e39f3ba48e has 4 suppliers with various statuses (Draft, Failed, Disabled)

backend_apis.GET /api/supplier-credentials/admin/agen: PASS - Lists all agencies with summary

frontend_ui.tabs: PASS - Acenteler and Audit Log tabs work
frontend_ui.agencies_list: PASS - Shows agencies with credential summary badges
frontend_ui.agency_detail_view: PASS - Shows 4 supplier cards with masked credentials
frontend_ui.action_buttons: PASS - Test, Edit, Enable/Disable, Remove buttons clickable
frontend_ui.test_connection: PASS - Shows FAIL result with latency (expected with fake credentials)
frontend_ui.audit_log_tab: PASS - Shows audit entries with filter input

rbac.agency_admin_own_only: PASS - Blocked from /admin/*, can access own credentials

audit_logging.save_action_logged: PASS - Creates audit entry on credential save
audit_logging.test_action_logged: PASS - Creates audit entry on test connection
audit_logging.toggle_action_logged: PASS - Creates audit entry on enable/disable

mocked_note: Supplier connection tests hit real external APIs but with fake/test credentials, so they return auth_failed - this is expected behavior as noted by main agent. No mocked APIs in the implementation.
